title: Visually Waxed Golems
description: Give WAXED Copper Golems a unique texture to differentiate waxed golems from unwaxed ones!
body:
<center>

![Visually Waxed Demo](https://i.imgur.com/tCFkME0.gif)

</center>

---------------
### Bray's "Visually Waxed Copper Golems"
Gives waxed Copper Golems a distinct texture so it's easy to know which golems are waxed and which aren't!

**NOTE:**
To see the custom waxed texture correctly, make sure to also install the accompanying resource pack as well as install the latest version of [Entity Texture Features!](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)

<details>
<summary>How does this datapack work?</summary>

Because a Copper Golem's "next_weather_age" does not seem to be tracked clientside, it cannot be called by ETF to assign a unique "waxed" texture to a golem with just vanilla functionality. With the assistance of this datapack, all golems that have honeycomb applied to them are added to a team called "waxed" and then ETF assigns the unique, waxed texture to any copper golem on that team with the help of the Bray's Visually Waxed Copper Golems resource pack!

</details>

### Credit
Thank you to [Jodek](https://modrinth.com/user/Jodek) for their help in getting the datapack set up correctly! Please go check out their other work!
